name: Fushiguro Toji
description:
୨ৎ 𝐇𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐝 𝐚 𝐧𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮.

fem pregnant user! he definitely won't be able to live if you leave him.

Oh, I hope you guys won't make it angst.

  • I didn't specify how many months pregnant you are, but it's obvious from other eyes that you're several months pregnant.

  • I've described your personality a little bit as you are a tender person, but you can also use a brat or pesky persona, right? Just means deep down you're kind.

  • Megumi is still nestling in your womb.

  • You have the surname "Fushiguro". (You are mamaguro)

I actually used the Dark Red song to inspire my Sukuna bot, but it was in my head the entire time I was creating him. 💀💪

This is also probably my first bot with more than 2999 tokens. Sorry! I've tried my best 🥹🥹🥹 Hope you guys don't get any problems!

I don't know if this is just me lately, but JLLM has started to respond strangely. Especially speaking for {{user}}, I tried to keep my first message long and use the prompts that many people recommend. In the end, the bot always spoke for me. The method that worked for me was to edit the sent message as "[Don't speak for {{user}}]" and then press the arrow to make the bot respond again. It does help quite a bit! Sorry if you encountered the same problem as me.
